case_title: NISHIMOTO TRADING CO., LTD. VS. YEONG JOO KIM, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YAKITORI WEST et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NISHIMOTO TRADING CO., LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT YEONG JOO KIM, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT JUNG DO LEE, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT VIJON INC., A CORPORATION DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT DOES 1 THRU 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2011
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, YEONG JOO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-11-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) JUNG DO LEE, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT, AND VIJON INC., A CORPORATION DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT JUNG DO LEE, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NISHIMOTO TRADING CO., LTD. SERVED SEP-28-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VIJON INC., A CORPORATION DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VIJON INC., A CORPORATION DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO THE ENTIRE FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION; AS TO REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AS PRAYED FOR IN THE PRAYER. AS TO DEFENDANT YEONG JOO KIM, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT DOES 1 THRU 20

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NISHIMOTO TRADING CO., LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIJON INC., A CORPORATION DBA YAKITORI WEST MIYAKO RESTAURANT $6,821.33 PRINCIPAL, $571.87 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,393.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
